steps.title: Spot where the game appears
steps.content: To show traders played the game, the evidence needs to demonstrate the game is found where traders were. The decisive clue is whether the game's locations align with where traders were active.

steps.title: Connect the game's distribution to traders
steps.content:
Choice C establishes that all known examples are found along routes used primarily by traders, directly placing the game where traders were most active.

The other choices either scatter the game across multiple homes, show geographic connections without trader involvement, or address other goods.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
